audit_items.proof_trace: The file contains exactly one function with one pointer dereference: `parsers->push_back(...)`. The sole call site (rpc_server_message_stream.h:65) passes `&_rpc_request_parsers`, a member variable address that cannot be null in C++. Standard `operator new` throws `std::bad_alloc` on failure rather than returning null, so the `RpcRequestParserPtr(new ...)` constructions are also safe.
